name: comer-rokid-platform
description: Brain · Eval Lab — unified procedural-knowledge graph and agent-evaluation platform for the Comer Industries / Rokid pilot.

scripts.build: npm --workspace backend run build && npm --workspace eval-lab run build
scripts.typecheck: tsc -p . --noEmit && npm --workspace backend run typecheck && npm --workspace eval-lab run typecheck
scripts.lab: echo 'Open http://localhost:3001/lab/ after running npm run dev'
